/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO GIVE HALF TIME CREDIT/NP/DEF:IS CURRENTLY IN STATEPRISON/X:NO OPPOSITION RECEIVED BY THE PEOPLE,/X:THE COURT HAVING RECEIVED A MOTION FROM THE DEFENDANT, THE COURT FINDS THE DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TORECEIVED CREDITS PER PC 4019 AND AMEND THE SENTENCE IMPOSED ON 12-18-09 NUNC PRO TUNC TO THAT DATE,/X:THE ABSTRACT OF THAT SENTENCE WHICH WAS PREPARED ON 12-18-09 IS ALSO AMENDED TO REFLECT AS FOLLOWS:/X:DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED OF 122 DAYS COUNTY JAIL 122 DAYS SAGE FOR A TOTALOF 244 DAYS,/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO GIVE HALF TIME CREDIT/NP/DEF:IS STATE PRISON/X:DEFENSE MOTION FOR SUPPLEMENTAL MOTION FOR RE SENTENCING/X:THE COURT WILL ALLOW THE PEOPLE TO FILE THEIR RESPONSE,/CONT/
